key_facts.archive_note: xcodebuild archive from terminal fails with errSecInternalComponent (keychain locked) — use Xcode GUI: Product > Destination > Any iOS Device (arm64), then Product > Archive
key_facts.simulator_build_name: iPhone 16 Pro (OS 18.5) — used for build verification
key_facts.dossier_ipad_layout: DossierIPadLayout in DossierRootView — 3-column HStack: LEFT 240pt sidebar, MIDDLE flex, RIGHT ~30% proportional DossierSourcesPanel via GeometryReader
key_facts.dossier_iphone_layout: DossierKBDetailView with DossierTabBar safeAreaInset at bottom — hSizeClass==.compact portrait
key_facts.dossier_iphone_landscape: DossierIPhoneLandscapeLayout — 200pt sidebar + NavigationStack(DossierKBDetailView); triggers on hSizeClass==.compact && vSizeClass==.compact
key_facts.context_menu_technique: Long-press = mouse_move → left_mouse_down → wait 1.2s → left_mouse_up (right-click does NOT work for iOS context menus in simulator)
key_facts.dossier_tabs: KB=0(KNOWLEDGE BASE), DOCS=1, QUERY=2, FLOW=3, LOG=4(DossierArchiveView)
key_facts.cloudkit_container: iCloud.com.dhorn.ragflowmobile — private DB only; syncs KBs, Books, Sessions, Messages, Workflows
key_facts.chat_params_note: ChatParams(modelOverride, temperature, topP, extraSystemPrompt) — all 3 LLM services accept params
key_facts.sources_accordion_ipad: Inline accordion hidden on iPad (hSizeClass != .compact) — sources show in DossierSourcesPanel right column only
key_facts.sources_auto_update: onChange(of: vm.messages.count) in DossierChatContent calls onMessageTap?(last) to auto-select newest assistant message in sources panel
key_facts.ragion_rename_complete: All user-visible RAGFlow/RAGflow strings replaced with Ragion — only internal identifiers (bundle IDs, file extensions, Swift type names, code comments) remain
key_facts.parallel_step_note: M2: runBranchStep is nonisolated static; RAGService.retrieve requires 'try? await' from that context; Tasks started in a loop interleave at I/O suspension points for practical parallelism
